name: Diana, Lunari
text: When a showdown begins here, you may pay :rb_energy_1:. If you do, [Predict], then reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, draw it. (To Predict, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

accessibility_text: Riftbound Unit: Diana, Lunari. When a showdown begins here, you may pay [1]. If you do, [Predict], then reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, draw it. (To Predict, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)
